string 2:
Squawk! Remember me? I'm the Muchomon you helped with the
FunBeemon eight years ago.

Thanks again for the help! But get a load of this weird
"Formal Challenge" letter I got!

"Destroyer of our bases, vengeance is nigh. I await thee at
the station." -Secret Base Leader
{next}Sounds like you're in trouble.
{next}That's hard to follow...
{next}And if I don't go?

No, this is meant for you! You're the one who destroyed the
FunBeemon hives! Squawk!

And the letter goes on to say that that bees will attack us
here if this duel is ignored!

I didn't get it, either, so I asked around. Apparently this
bee wants revenge on you.

And the letter goes on to say that that bees will attack us
here if this duel is ignored!

Squawk! You make it sound like you're going to ignore this!
You can't! You have to go!

And the letter goes on to say that that bees will attack us
here if this duel is ignored!

I guess I was wrong to think the FunBeemon were part of a
Titan plot. Now I feel awful.
But, this time, it could be our village that gets destroyed!

Please! Go to the requested duel site and try explaining
that this is all just a big misunderstanding!
{next}You got it.
{end}I'm going to miss this place...
Th-Thanks! You're the only one I can turn to!

Hey! Don't go writing us off like that! This place is still
just fine! Help us, please!

Human...! At last... At last we meet again! Lowly destroyer
of our queendom...

...Long have I awaited this day, even suffering through
Titan rule for my revenge!

But now, after eight years, my satisfaction is at hand.
Human, I offer thee my thanks.
{next}Let's settle this.
{next}Can't we talk this out?
{next}What were those fake beehives, really?

It would seem thou art prepared for this as well. I
acknowledge thee as a worthy foe!

Let me ask thee, human. Eight years ago, didst thou seek out
an exchange of words?

Or were thy actions motivated by an imagined Titan plot?
Therein lies thy answer!

They were our... No, I dare not reveal such secrets to a
human, but their loss was dear.

But enough talk. With my lance I shall pin thy silvered
tongue to thy palate!
Let the battle... begin!

So... I am defeated. There is no denying the result. I lost
that battle utterly.

As I am weak, I submit myself to the will of the strong.
What wouldst thou have of me?
{next}Be my ally.
{next}I'd like us to talk.
{next}Nothing at all.

Thou wouldst enlist the aid of a bested foe? Hahaha! Thou
art strange, indeed!

Were our circumstances different... But no. My pride bids me
speak no more. Instead...

Indeed... One might say that overzealous concealment of our
base has made dialogue nigh impossible, after all.

Otherwise, we may sooner have achieved diplomatic relations.
This has long been a bitter regret of mine.

Thou art both gracious and cruel to set aside the revenge
that was all I lived for.

Very well. If thou bidst me to do as I will, then I shall
act as I please.

I hereby swear that I shall retire to a home in the vicinity
of Gear Forest Village.

I have heard various efforts at restoration are underway. I,
too, wish to rebuild.

But do not misunderstand me. I undertake this only so as to
ensure my own survival.
{next}That's fine.
{next}I recommend living in peace with the others.
{next}Whatever you want.

I shall exact my revenge upon thee yet, by living on and
lingering in thy heart.

Hmph! Have no fear. I gave up being leader long ago. I shall
become part of the village.

A curious turn of phrase. I have always done so. But what am
I suited for beside revenge?
Apologies. I begin to speak too freely. Farewell.

Squawk! This cool, super strong-looking Digimon showed up!
Was that the challenger?

He apologized and asked to help rebuild, and I apologized for
wrongfully suspecting a Titan plot.

I'm glad we made up! Squawk! Oh, and here. Take this as
thanks for saving the village!

I really appreciate you taking care of things like this!
Squawk, squawk!

My handmade sweets have grown popular indeed. Others truly
seem to enjoy them. Hehe!
